prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi (FR5) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbo upgrade, supporting 380 HP and 420 Nm torque via a custom ECU flash from Unichip Q4+ with ethanol flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF15H) for the 8-speed automatic transmission (A8TR1-1), paired with a PTP Motorsports aluminum driveshaft and upgraded CV axles from Driveshaft Shop (DSS) with 300M steel internals

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #DFV 23-000-01) with custom valving for the Santa Fe's 113.2-inch wheelbase, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF0116K) and Eibach Pro-Street S sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (part #RB-SF01) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders, paired with a custom 3D-printed active grille shutter delete for improved airflow to the intercooler

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 +25 (front) and 20x11.5 +30 (rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/40/20 front, 295/35/20 rear) with custom TPMS sensors from Schrader (part #20008)

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #29106) with custom mounting brackets for the Santa Fe's chassis, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm diameter) and a full Alcantara headliner from Katzkin (part #HYU-SANTAFE-CAL)
